page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.m2.xlarge is an x86_64 architecture server instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 8 dedicated physical cores with 8 vCPUs, meaning hyperthreading is disabled with a 1.0 thread-per-core configuration. The instance is equipped with 64.0 GB of system memory, providing a high memory-to-vCPU ratio of 8.0 GB per core.

This instance does not include local NVMe or SSD storage, requiring network-attached block storage for operating system and application data. It does not feature any GPU accelerators or complimentary public IPv4 addresses.

Due to its dedicated CPU allocation and high memory density, the ecs.m2.xlarge offers a stable resource profile for memory-intensive workloads. The absence of hyperthreading ensures predictable compute performance per core. This configuration is suitable for relational databases, in-memory caching layers, and enterprise applications that require a larger memory footprint relative to compute resources without the overhead of shared-core environments.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.m2.xlarge is a memory-optimized virtual server instance built on the x86_64 architecture and managed via the KVM hypervisor. It delivers 8 dedicated vCPUs mapped directly to 8 physical cores, operating without hyperthreading to ensure consistent and predictable compute performance. The instance is provisioned with 64.0 GB of RAM, yielding a high memory-to-core ratio of 8.0 GB per vCPU. It does not include local storage or GPU hardware, relying entirely on network-attached storage. This hardware profile is designed for memory-intensive workloads, such as database hosting, caching layers, and enterprise applications, where a stable memory-to-CPU ratio is critical for operational efficiency.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.m2.xlarge is a memory-optimized KVM instance featuring 8 dedicated x86_64 vCPUs, 64.0 GB of RAM, and no local storage, designed for database and memory-intensive enterprise workloads.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.m2.xlarge is a memory-optimized KVM instance with 8 dedicated x86_64 vCPUs and 64.0 GB of RAM for database workloads.
tagline: A dedicated memory-optimized instance featuring an eight-to-one gigabyte-to-vCPU ratio for stable and predictable database and caching workloads.
bullet_points: 8 dedicated x86_64 vCPUs with no hyperthreading
64.0 GB of system memory providing 8.0 GB per core
KVM hypervisor virtualization with dedicated CPU allocation
No local storage or integrated GPU accelerators
Suitable for in-memory databases, caching, and enterprise applications
